pendingAdvisoryMessages:
TRAJECTORY ALERT: context_thrash detected (severity: medium) at steps 1-3
CATEGORY: coordination_error
GUIDANCE: Agent is requesting increasingly large file sets. Consider focusing on the specific files needed for the current task or compacting context.
ACTION: Restrict file access to only /home/fiod/medical/AGENTS.md, /home/fiod/medical/README.md, /home/fiod/medical/pyproject.toml. Use targeted file selection instead of broad context requests.

TRAJECTORY ALERT: repetition_loop detected (severity: medium) at steps 5-6
CATEGORY: coordination_error
GUIDANCE: Agent is repeating the same action on the same target. Consider consolidating changes, stepping back to review the approach, or delegating to a different agent.
ACTION: Stop repetitive edits to /home/fiod/medical by build. Take a step back and consolidate the changes made so far before proceeding.
